scripts.package: npm run build && powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path dist\* -DestinationPath celticly.zip -Force; Write-Host 'Created celticly.zip — load the dist/ folder in Chrome or share the zip'"
scripts.package:webstore: npm run build && powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path dist\* -DestinationPath celticly-webstore.zip -Force; Write-Host 'Created celticly-webstore.zip — upload this zip to the Chrome Web Store (contains only dist/)';"
